text:
EXPLANATION: The UCBShift software at https://github.com/THGLab/CSpred is real, but the cited title ("Ucbshift: Protein chemical shift prediction using transfer learning and machine learning") does not match the actual paper title. The real paper is titled "Accurate prediction of chemical shifts for aqueous protein structure on 'Real World' data," authored by Jie Li, Kochise C. Bennett, Yuchen Liu, Michael V. Martin, and Teresa Head-Gordon (Chemical Science, 2020) — none of whom match the cited authors (Y. Zhou, Y. Wang, H. Li, Y. Zhang, D. Xu).
LINK: https://pubs.rsc.org/en/content/articlelanding/2020/sc/c9sc06561j
FOUND_TITLE: Accurate prediction of chemical shifts for aqueous protein structure on "Real World" data
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jie Li, Kochise C. Bennett, Yuchen Liu, Michael V. Martin, Teresa Head-Gordon
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: LIKELY
